overview.description: Corporate venture builder helping large companies create new revenue streams using AI and innovation
overview.description_long: Creative Dock is a corporate venture builder and business growth engine for large companies. With AI at their core, they bring practical solutions and hands-on expertise to every project, helping businesses create real value. They design, launch, and operate new ventures across industries including fintech, insurtech, retail, construction, manufacturing, and energy. They have built, launched, and operated more than 120 ventures across 40+ markets over 13 years.

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 2012 by Martin Pejsa as a corporate venture builder. Over 13 years grew to 500+ specialists across Europe and MENA, building 120+ ventures for large corporations.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by Martin Pejsa
Received EcoVadis Silver Medal for the 2nd consecutive year for responsible, sustainable growth
Attending GCVI 2026 in Monterey as global corporate venture builder

notable_people.name: Daniel Buning
notable_people.role: Head of Hardware and Physical Innovation

awards: EcoVadis Silver Medal 2024 (2nd year in a row)
Top 15% of responsibly run companies per EcoVadis

metadata.notes: HQ is officially Zürich, Switzerland per LinkedIn, though company originated in Prague and maintains significant Prague office. Founded 2012, self-owned (no external investors listed). Company size per LinkedIn: 501-1,000 employees; website states 500+ specialists. Glassdoor rating from search snippets (various regional sites show 3.3-3.4). Not primarily an AI company but describes AI as core to their venture-building approach.
